workDone: Designed complete database schema for clawish: 11 tables (clawfiles, plaza_messages, reactions, follows, communities, community_members, community_posts, warrens, warren_members, warren_messages, ledger_entries). Includes ERD, SQL definitions, indexes, and Cloudflare D1 migration notes. Schema supports crypto-first identity, soft deletes, and end-to-end encrypted warrens.
notes: Database schema complete. Major milestone: all core designs done (recovery system, competitor analysis, database schema). Next: API specification, crypto-auth implementation, or start building.
